title: Elite Games 2
description: Elite Games 2 is the pack used by everyone playing in Elite Eric's 456 Player Squid Games Event!
body: This pack is meant to be used by people playing on [Elite Eric's](https://www.youtube.com/c/EliteEric) 456 Player Squid Game Event. This includes just basic performance mods to insure players have an equal experience in the event.
